productName: Good Tide Grapefruit Gummies - Sativa Rosin + CBD + CBC - 100mg THC : 100mg CBD : 100mg CBC
description: A gourmet tangy grapefruit citrus gummy imagined with island-grown cane sugar, orchard fruit, and the kind of small-batch technique usually reserved for handmade luxury candies. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBC to round out the full-plant entourage effect. A flavorful sativa option for customers who want their cannabis wrapped in something genuinely craveable.
